title: OpenAI floats giving Trump administration 5 percent cut of AI boom
author: Robert Hart
raw_description: OpenAI has floated giving the US government a 5 percent ownership stake as a way of easing tensions with the Trump administration and blunting mounting public backlash against AI, according to the Financial Times. CEO Sam Altman argued that giving the public a financial interest in the company would be the best way to share […]
summary: OpenAI提议向美国政府提供5%股权，以缓解与特朗普政府的紧张关系并应对公众对AI的反弹。
analysis_note: 涉及AI政策与商业策略，但非技术突破，相关性一般。
